'''dhayutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kye|kye]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kye|kye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhayutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæyitith|dhæyitith]] || [[word:dhæyitij|dhæyitij]] || [[word:dhæyitish|dhæyitish]] || [[word:dhæyiti|dhæyiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayuyututh|dhayuyututh]] || [[word:dhayuyutuj|dhayuyutuj]] || [[word:dhayuyutush|dhayuyutush]] || [[word:dhayuyutu|dhayuyutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayututh|dhayututh]] || [[word:dhayutuj|dhayutuj]] || [[word:dhayutush|dhayutush]] || [[word:dhayutu|dhayutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayuftuth|dhayuftuth]] || [[word:dhayuftuj|dhayuftuj]] || [[word:dhayuftush|dhayuftush]] || [[word:dhayuftuf|dhayuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhayututhu|dhayututhu]] || [[word:dhayutuju|dhayutuju]] || [[word:dhayutushu|dhayutushu]] || [[word:dhayutuku|dhayutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhayututh|dhayututh]] || [[word:dhayutuj|dhayutuj]] || [[word:dhayutush|dhayutush]] || [[word:dhayutu|dhayutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhayututhul|dhayututhul]] || [[word:dhayutujul|dhayutujul]] || [[word:dhayutushul|dhayutushul]] || [[word:dhayutukul|dhayutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhayututhuthu|dhayututhuthu]] || [[word:dhayutujuju|dhayutujuju]] || [[word:dhayutushushu|dhayutushushu]] || [[word:dhayutuku|dhayutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhayututhun|dhayututhun]] || [[word:dhayutujun|dhayutujun]] || [[word:dhayutushun|dhayutushun]] || [[word:dhayutukun|dhayutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhayututhuoro|dhayututhuoro]] || [[word:dhayutujuoro|dhayutujuoro]] || [[word:dhayutushuoro|dhayutushuoro]] || [[word:dhayutukuoro|dhayutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
